title: Tissue lysis and digestion for MS analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"f75g5","text":"Here, a workflow for sample preparation and quantification of brain and pancreatic tissue proteins with use of heavy labelled protein standards (QPrESTs) is described. The standards are added before the digestion ensuring high reproducibility and elimination of nuances apearing during proteolytical cleavage of proteins and further steps such as solid phase extraction. QPrESTs are heavy labelled recombinant protein fragments covering regions of proteins with low homology and span over 50-150 aminoacids. They were produced as a part of Human Protein Atlas project in auxotrofic E.coli and individually purified, serving as an excelent resource for MS-based protein quantification.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Incubate adapter of the Tissue Lyser on dry ice for 00:30:00 Tissue Lyser LT (QIAGEN, 85600, Bead mill, https://www.qiagen.com/us/shop/automated-solutions/sample-disruption/tissuelyser-lt/#orderinginformation )

Add one 3mm bead to the tissue sample and incubate on dry ice for 00:30:00 Tungsten Carbide Beads, 3 mm (QIAGEN, 69997, Beads for use with Tissue Lyser systems, https://www.qiagen.com/se/shop/automated-solutions/accessories/beads/#orderinginformation )

Disrupt the tissue using the Tissue Lyser for 00:02:00 Tissue Lyser LT (QIAGEN, 85600, Bead mill, https://www.qiagen.com/us/shop/automated-solutions/sample-disruption/tissuelyser-lt/#orderinginformation )
Add 250 µL of Lysis Buffer (7M Urea, 2M Thiourea, 2% SDC)

Homogenize the tissue using the Tissue Lyser for 00:02:00 Tissue Lyser LT (QIAGEN, 85600, Bead mill, https://www.qiagen.com/us/shop/automated-solutions/sample-disruption/tissuelyser-lt/#orderinginformation )
Centrifuge for 00:30:00 at 20,000 × g at 4 °C
Precipitate the proteins with 4 volumes of ice-cold acetone and incubate in -20 °C over night
Centrifuge at 20,000 × g at 4 °C for 00:30:00 and discard the supernatant
Wash the pellet two times with 400 µL of ice-cold acetone followed by centrifugation at 20,000 × g at 4 °C for 00:10:00 00:10:00
Remove the acetone excess and dry the pellet
Dissolve the pellet in 200 µL of Pellet Solubilizer (7M Urea, 2M Thiourea)

Dilute 8 times with 100 millimolar (mM) TEAB and measure protein concentration using Bio-Rad Protein assay according to the manufacturers instructions Bio-Rad Protein Assay Bio-Rad Laboratories Catalog #5000001
Take volume that corresponds to 15 µg of proteins and add QPrESTs mixture
Add DTT to a final concentration of 10 millimolar (mM) and incubate 01:00:00 at 30 °C
Add CAA to a final concentration of 50 millimolar (mM) and incubate 00:30:00 in the dark at room temperature
Add 300 ng of Pierce Trypsin protease and incubate over night at 37 °C
Quench the digestion with TFA to a final concentration of 0.5% (v/v)

Prepare one StageTip per sample by inserting 3 layers of Empore Cation Extraction Discs in a 200uL tip Empore Discs (47mm cation extraction disks, 3M, 2251-1, https://www.sterlitech.com/empore-disks-cation-exchange-sr-2251-1.html )
Activate membrane with 50 µL 100% MeOH, spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00
Equilibrate StageTip with 50 µL Wash Buffer (30% MeOH, 0.1% FA), spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00
Apply sample to the StageTip, spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00
Wash two times with 30 µL Wash Buffer (30% MeOH, 0.1% FA), spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00 00:01:00
Elute two times with 20 µL Elution Buffer (30% MeOH, 1.65% NH 4 OH), spin at 1000 x g for 00:01:00 00:01:00
Vacuum dry for 00:30:00 at 42 °C and store at -20 °C until MS-analysis
For MS analysis, dissolve samples in Solvent A and inject 1.75 ug
creator: David Kotol
